title: Test method signatures should be correct
description: Test method signatures should be correctAnalyze your codeintentionality-logicalmaintainabilityCode SmelltestsWhy is this an issue?More InfoA method is identified as a test method if it is marked with one of the following attributes:[TestMethod]or[DataTestMethod](forMSTest).[Fact]or[Theory](forxUnit).[Test],[TestCase],[TestCaseSource], or[Theory](forNUnit).However, non-publicmethods are not considered test methods and will not be executed, regardless of whether they have a test attribute. Additionally, methods with theasync voidmodifier or methods that contain generics<T>anywhere in their signatures are also excluded from being recognized as tests and will not be executed.[TestMethod] void TestNullArg() // Noncompliant, method is not public { /* ... */ } [TestMethod] public async void MyIgn
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Test method must be public - non-public test methods are not executed
Test method should use async Task instead of async void
Generic test methods are not recognized and will not be executed

logic.reasoning: Detects test methods with invalid signatures: non-public, async void, or generic methods are not recognized as tests by test frameworks.
